effects.effect: If "Dynal" is in your discard pile: you can pay 3 FP; Play this Vivosaur.

effects.name: Dinuarian Royalty
effects.effect: Cannot be played, except by an effect. FP Cards placed into both players' FP Zone are played Face-Down. You can use your Opponent's Face-Down cards to pay your [Dinuarian] Attack Skills or Action Cards.

effects.name: Royal Combo
effects.effect: Apply Excite to the defending Vivosaur.

effects.name: Imperial Wrath
effects.effect: Apply Poison to the defending Vivosaur.
